response.justification: Over fifteen years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, React and MongoDB in production at Optilyz, cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and current hands-on AI-agent/MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly matching the role's unusual AI agent development requirement. Craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligns with the quality and code-review expectations. Gaps are secondary: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest, and Kotlin is absent though Java is present.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js full-stack experience well beyond the 6-year requirement
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matching a rare role requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and teaching/workshop track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Frontend history leans more on Ember.js than React
No Kotlin and limited Python evidence for the multi-language requirement
